title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 26 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 26 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 26 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/02/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures experienced a significant decline, with some recovery in the afternoon. The most-tradedI2505 contract ultimately closed at 812 yuan/mt, down 0.98% for the day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills engaged in small and frequent purchases.
